description_long: This is a medium-sized, military green backpack with a subtle camouflage pattern covering its fabric exterior. The front features a large flap secured by a central brown leather strap and metal buckle, with a blue denim patch sewn onto the lower right side for a touch of character. Two side pockets, each with their own small brown straps and buckles, provide additional storage and are integrated into the main body. The back is equipped with two wide, adjustable brown shoulder straps, attached with black plastic hardware for comfort and durability. The overall shape is rounded and slightly structured, suggesting a soft but supportive build. The backpack appears practical for urban use, blending rugged style with functional design.
description: A green camouflage-patterned backpack with brown leather straps, a blue denim patch, and multiple pockets, designed for urban utility and style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main flap with a brown strap and buckle, blue denim patch, and both side pockets visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the main compartment, the side pocket with its strap, and the curvature of the backpack.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the two wide brown shoulder straps and the back panel, with no pockets or patches visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side pocket and strap, as well as the overall thickness and profile of the backpack.
attribute_strap_design: Two wide, adjustable brown shoulder straps with black plastic hardware; additional small brown straps with buckles on each side pocket.
attribute_pocket_configuration: One main compartment under the front flap, two external side pockets with straps and buckles.
attribute_decorative_elements: Blue denim patch sewn onto the lower right front; camouflage pattern on the main fabric.
